title: Task Contract
description: Schema for delegating bounded work slices to subagents. Each contract is derived from the current State Ledger and passed as the subagent's sole context.

task_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this delegated task

round_version.description: Version of the iteration round this contract was created in

phase.description: Pipeline phase this contract belongs to

agent_role.description: Role of the agent receiving this contract

parallel_group.description: Tag identifying which agents were spawned in the same batch, e.g. 'requirements-round-1'

objective.description: Single sentence describing what this task must achieve

files_allowed.description: File paths or globs the subagent may read or modify

files_avoid.description: File paths or globs the subagent must not touch

must_respect.description: Contracts, constraints, or rules the subagent must honor

expected_deliverable.description: Concrete output the subagent must produce, in Agent Return format

stop_when.description: Clear finish line that ends this task

escalate_if.description: Decision point or blocker that requires Orchestrator intervention
